task_description: Sprint 6: Task Mastery - Fix calendar card CSS bug, add recurring tasks, labels/tags, drag tasks to calendar, right-click context menu, bulk actions, auto-pilot AI mode, and template library.

verification.summary: All 5 features implemented and verified. Frontend build (npm run build) passes with all new pages. ESLint shows no warnings or errors. Backend py_compile passes for main.py, autopilot.py, and templates.py. Post-review fixes applied: custom recurrence days logic, touch-accessible bulk menus, system_instruction prompt injection mitigation.
